amdp-hana-016.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, HANA optimization aur AMDP ka Technical Design Document ek blueprint hai jo solution architecture clearly capture karta hai. Mandatory sections hote hain: business requirement, current vs target state, AMDP class aur method signature, USING dependencies, SQLScript logic flow, authorization design, error handling, transport plan, aur test cases. Practically, mere project mein AMDP TDD mein ABAP wrapper authorization, MANDT handling, expected response time, aur PlanViz baseline sab document kiya. Peer review se 2-3 design issues pehle hi pakad liye gaye. Iska benefit yeh hai ki AMDP code review, transport, aur production support ke time TDD reference banta hai aur knowledge silos nahi bante.
amdp-hana-016.interviewScriptEnglish: A Technical Design Document for HANA optimization or AMDP captures the architectural intent before any code is written. Mandatory sections include business requirement, current state vs target state, class and method signatures, USING clause dependencies, the SQLScript logic flow described in pseudocode, authorization model, error handling strategy, transport sequence, performance baseline, and test cases. We use ADT for development but maintain the TDD in Confluence or SharePoint with diagrams. Peer review catches design issues such as missing client filters or inadequate authorization before they reach code. The business value is fewer defects, smoother audits, and faster onboarding when team members rotate.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: AMDP clause documented in TDD listing every dependent table or view
Method parameters captured in the signature section of the TDD
Section describing how AUTHORITY-CHECK is enforced in the ABAP wrapper
Recorded ST05 or PlanViz numbers used as success criteria
Ordered list of dependent objects that must move together

commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Transport failures occur when dependent CDS or tables are not part of the sequence
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: List every transparent table, CDS view, and called AMDP in the TDD with transport order

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Writing the SQLScript directly in TDD as runnable code
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: TDD becomes a brittle copy of the source and falls out of sync
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Capture pseudocode with logical steps and a link to the code repository

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Documenting performance expectations without baseline numbers
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: There is nothing to compare against during testing or post-go-live
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Capture the baseline ST05/PlanViz figures and target SLA in the TDD

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Treating peer review as a formality
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Misses authorization, NULL handling, and pushdown gaps that are hard to find later
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Use a structured AMDP review checklist signed off by another senior developer

amdp-hana-016.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Blueprint document covering business need, design, dependencies, and validation for AMDP work.

Used for:
- Pre-development alignment between architects and developers
- Reference during code review and transport
- Audit and knowledge handover

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- Sections: requirement, signature, USING, SQLScript pseudocode, authorization, errors, transport, tests
- ADT for development; Confluence/SharePoint for the TDD
- ST05/PlanViz baseline numbers as success criteria

Interview keyword: structured design before code

amdp-hana-017.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, AMDP effort estimation mein technical complexity, data volume, testing scope aur dependencies sab consider karte hain. Simple AMDP — single table read with aggregation — ka effort 1-2 days hai. Complex multi-step with CDS Table Function, authorization, aur extensive testing 5-7 days le sakta hai. Estimation buckets banao: design 20 percent, development 40 percent, unit testing 20 percent, integration plus performance testing 20 percent. Practically, mere project mein finance migration mein 15 AMDPs ka estimate diya — uncertainty ke liye 20 percent buffer add kiya. Iska benefit yeh hai ki stakeholders ko realistic timeline milta hai aur project plan stable rehta hai surprises ke bina.
amdp-hana-017.interviewScriptEnglish: AMDP effort estimation considers complexity, data volume, dependency depth, and testing rigor. A simple read-only AMDP with one table and basic aggregation might take one to two days; a complex multi-step AMDP that calls other AMDPs, integrates with a CDS Table Function for Fiori, and requires extensive parallel testing can take five to seven days. We break effort into design, development, unit testing, and integration plus performance testing. Story points are useful for relative sizing in agile teams; calendar days work better for fixed-bid projects. A 20 percent buffer accommodates HANA-specific tuning iterations. The business value is realistic timelines and predictable delivery.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: Relative sizing measure used in agile estimation
Percentage uplift added to handle estimation uncertainty
Pre-work measurement guiding the optimization effort
Running old and new logic side by side, adds to effort

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Estimating only the development time and ignoring testing
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Testing AMDP needs HANA tools and parallel runs which often exceed coding time
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Split estimate into design, dev, unit test, integration test, and performance test

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Skipping a buffer for HANA tuning iterations
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: PlanViz feedback often requires query rewrites that extend the timeline
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Add 15 to 25 percent buffer depending on complexity

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Presenting raw hours to non-technical stakeholders
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Hours hide trade-offs and risk being treated as deadlines
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Translate estimates into business value, milestones, and risk callouts

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Using the same estimate for AMDP and CDS Table Function work
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Table Function adds metadata, OData publishing, and Fiori integration overhead
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Estimate Table Function separately, accounting for metadata and OData testing

amdp-hana-017.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Structured approach to sizing AMDP-related work.

Used for:
- Sprint planning and release roadmaps
- Communicating delivery timelines to stakeholders
- Negotiating scope on fixed-bid AMDP projects

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- Buckets: design 20, dev 40, unit test 20, integration+perf 20 percent
- Buffer 15 to 25 percent for tuning iterations
- Story points for agile, days for fixed-bid
- Baseline ST05/PlanViz numbers as inputs

Interview keyword: realistic, multi-bucket estimation

amdp-hana-018.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, AMDP development mein bahut saare SAP transactions aur tools combine hote hain. Eclipse ADT primary IDE hai class aur method creation ke liye. ST05 SQL trace pushdown verify karne ke liye. SAT runtime analysis profiling ke liye. DBACOCKPIT HANA-side monitoring ke liye. SE11 secondary index aur table buffering ke liye. STMS transport management ke liye. Practically, mere project mein AMDP slow report troubleshoot karte time ST05 se trace liya, fir DBACOCKPIT mein HANA-level execution dekhi, fir PlanViz HANA Studio mein khol ke bottleneck identify kiya. Iska benefit yeh hai ki tool ka right combination use karne se faster diagnosis hota hai aur production support cycle short ho jaata hai.
amdp-hana-018.interviewScriptEnglish: AMDP development relies on a combination of ABAP and HANA tools. Eclipse ADT is the primary IDE for class and method creation; ST05 traces SQL calls; SAT profiles ABAP runtime; DBACOCKPIT and HANA Cockpit monitor HANA performance; SE11 maintains DDIC structures and secondary indexes; STMS controls transports. HANA Studio and HANA Database Explorer host PlanViz for execution analysis. Each tool plays a specific role: development in ADT, performance diagnosis in ST05 and DBACOCKPIT, plan analysis in PlanViz, and transport orchestration in STMS. The business value is shorter diagnosis cycles and predictable delivery cadence across the SAP and HANA stack.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse, primary IDE for AMDP and CDS
SQL trace transaction used to record and analyze SQL statements
Runtime analysis transaction for profiling ABAP and AMDP
Database administration cockpit including HANA monitoring
Data Dictionary maintenance transaction
Transport Management System for moving objects across landscapes
Combined ABAP/SQL trace transaction for end-to-end profiling

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Trying to develop AMDP only in SE80
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: SE80 lacks first-class support for AMDP and CDS; ADT is the recommended IDE
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Install Eclipse with ABAP Development Tools and use it for AMDP/CDS work

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Relying solely on ST05 without checking HANA Cockpit
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Misses HANA-side wait events and memory pressure indicators
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Combine ABAP-side ST05 trace with HANA Cockpit or DBACOCKPIT analysis

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Ignoring STMS transport sequence for AMDP and dependent CDS
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Activation failures appear in target system when dependencies arrive late
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Use STMS to plan ordered transport with CDS first, then AMDP

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Skipping ST12 for end-to-end performance profiling
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Loses correlation between ABAP runtime and SQL execution
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Use ST12 when both ABAP code and SQL share blame for performance

amdp-hana-018.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Catalogue of transactions and tools used across AMDP development and support.

Used for:
- Building AMDP classes and methods
- Performance diagnostics and tuning
- Transport orchestration to production

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- ADT (Eclipse) for development
- ST05, SAT, ST12 for performance
- DBACOCKPIT, HANA Cockpit, PlanViz for HANA monitoring
- SE11 for DDIC; STMS for transports

Interview keyword: right tool for each stage of the AMDP lifecycle

amdp-hana-019.interviewScriptHinglish: Sir, interview mein AMDP poochne ke baad aksar related concepts pe deep questions aate hain. BY DATABASE PROCEDURE vs BY DATABASE FUNCTION — procedure mein DML allowed, function strictly read-only aur CDS Table Function se back ho sakta hai. RAP mein AMDP determinations aur validations mein use ho sakta hai. HANA calculation views USING mein consume kar sakte hain. Production transport pe stored procedure automatically created hoti hai. Practically, mere project mein CDS Table Function ko AMDP function se back kiya — Fiori app ne directly consume kiya. Iska benefit yeh hai ki AMDP ke saath related ecosystem topics — CDS, RAP, calculation views, transport — sab smoothly explain kar sako interview mein.
amdp-hana-019.interviewScriptEnglish: AMDP follow-up questions in interviews typically explore the broader ecosystem. BY DATABASE PROCEDURE supports DML while BY DATABASE FUNCTION is strictly read-only and can implement CDS Table Functions. AMDP fits into RAP through determinations, validations, and queries. HANA calculation views can be accessed inside AMDP via the USING clause with proper schema qualification. On transport, SAP automatically regenerates the underlying stored procedure in the target system as part of class activation. Exception handling uses cx_amdp_error subclasses. Knowing these surrounding topics signals breadth of experience and helps connect AMDP to S/4HANA architecture in interviews.

wordByWordSamjho.meaning: AMDP method addition allowing DML and procedural logic
AMDP method addition for read-only table functions
RESTful ABAP Programming model for behaviour and query handlers
HANA modeling artifact consumable from AMDP via USING
CDS entity backed by an AMDP function
Standard exception class raised by AMDP failures
HANA built-in for generating date series without loops

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Using BY DATABASE PROCEDURE for read-only logic exposed to CDS
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: CDS Table Function requires BY DATABASE FUNCTION and read-only semantics
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Use BY DATABASE FUNCTION for table-function backing and PROCEDURE for general AMDP

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Calling HANA calculation views without schema qualification
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: AMDP cannot resolve the calculation view and activation fails
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Provide full schema path in USING and reference the view consistently

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Skipping cx_amdp_error catch in production code
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Runtime exceptions surface as ABAP dumps with poor context
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Wrap AMDP calls in TRY...CATCH cx_amdp_error and log the message text

commonMistakesSection.mistake: Assuming AMDP needs manual deployment on the target system
commonMistakesSection.whyWrong: Class transport automatically regenerates the HANA stored procedure
commonMistakesSection.correctApproach: Use standard STMS transports; verify activation status in the target client

amdp-hana-019.quickRevisionNotes:
What: Surrounding concepts that complete an AMDP-focused interview answer.

Used for:
- Demonstrating ecosystem awareness in interviews
- Designing CDS Table Functions backed by AMDP
- Integrating AMDP into RAP services

Key syntax / tables / Tcodes:
- BY DATABASE PROCEDURE vs BY DATABASE FUNCTION
- define table function ... implemented by method ...
- RAP determinations, validations, query handlers
- cx_amdp_error TRY-CATCH handling
- SERIES_GENERATE_DATE for date series

Interview keyword: AMDP plus its ecosystem in S/4HANA
